016package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.service;
017
018import android.content.Context;
019import androidx.room.Room;
020import dagger.Module;
021import dagger.Provides;
022import dagger.hilt.InstallIn;
023import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext;
024import dagger.hilt.components.SingletonComponent;
025import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.AutosaveSnapshotDao;
026import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ExportHistoryDao;
027import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.LayerDao;
028import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteColorDao;
029import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteDao;
030import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PixelDao;
031import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ProjectDao;
032import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.UserDao;
033import javax.inject.Singleton;
034
035/**
036 * Provides Hilt dependency injection configuration for Room database and DAOs. This module
037 * creates singleton instances of the database and all Data Access Objects (DAOs).
038 */
039@InstallIn(SingletonComponent.class)
040@Module
041public class DatabaseModule {
042
043  @Provides
044  @Singleton
045  LocalDatabase provideLocalDatabase(@ApplicationContext Context context) {
046    return Room
047        .databaseBuilder(context, LocalDatabase.class, LocalDatabase.DATABASE_NAME)
048        .build();
049  }
050
051  @Provides
052  @Singleton
053  UserDao provideUserDao(LocalDatabase database) {
054    return database.getUserDao();
055  }
056
057  @Provides
058  @Singleton
059  ProjectDao provideProjectDao(LocalDatabase database) {
060    return database.getProjectDao();
061  }
062
063  @Provides
064  @Singleton
065  LayerDao provideLayerDao(LocalDatabase database) {
066    return database.getLayerDao();
067  }
068
069  @Provides
070  @Singleton
071  PixelDao providePixelDao(LocalDatabase database) {
072    return database.getPixelDao();
073  }
074
075  @Provides
076  @Singleton
077  PaletteDao providePaletteDao(LocalDatabase database) {
078    return database.getPaletteDao();
079  }
080
081  @Provides
082  @Singleton
083  PaletteColorDao providePaletteColorDao(LocalDatabase database) {
084    return database.getPaletteColorDao();
085  }
086
087  @Provides
088  @Singleton
089  AutosaveSnapshotDao provideAutosaveSnapshotDao(LocalDatabase database) {
090    return database.getAutosaveSnapshotDao();
091  }
092
093  @Provides
094  @Singleton
095  ExportHistoryDao provideExportHistoryDao(LocalDatabase database) {
096    return database.getExportHistoryDao();
097  }
098
099}
